main.description: An on-chain proposal's off-chain content. Created before the on-chain call, linked via atprotoUri. Contains the human-readable details of what's being proposed.

description.description: Detailed description of what's being proposed, scope, deliverables, etc.

discussionTopicUri.description: If this proposal originated from a discussion, the topic ID (e.g., 'task:42' or 'discussion:...').

budget.description: Requested budget as a string (to preserve BigInt precision). '0' means equity-only.

tokenWeightBps.description: Requested ProjectToken allocation in basis points.

deadlineDays.description: Claim deadline in days from creation.
